_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (prompt injection, insecure output handling, training data poisoning, model theft, excessive agency).
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.540), SP-K-001 (SP, cosine: 0.538).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.510). Shared vocabulary: [vulnerabilities]. DCWF-only terms [identify, threat] vs WIDAI-only terms [10, agency, applications, data, excessive, handling] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.914, R=0.821). P exceeds R by 0.093 — the DCWF element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Identify threat vulnerabilities." and "Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 f" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.594 > STS 0.510 (gap +0.084). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [vulnerabilities] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Shared tokens: [vulnerabilities]. DCWF-only: [identify, threat]. WIDAI-only: [10, agency, applications, data, excessive, handling].
